ingredient_lines.input_item: Instructions Preheat Oven Wash and cut carrots if applicable. In a large bowl place carrots and EVOO. Coat evenly. Transfer carrots to a baking dish. Sprinkle with salt
ingredient_lines.note: to 375 degrees., whole sprigs are fine too. roast for 20 mins., in a small mixing bowl combine balsamic vinegar and honey. Whisk together., Pour balsamic and honey mixture over and coat evenly.
ingredient_lines.preparation: Remove carrots from over and transfer back into the large mixing bowl., Transfer back to the baking dish and roast for another 5-10 minutes until carrots are soft.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Instructions Preheat Oven to 375 degrees. Wash and cut carrots if applicable. In a large bowl place carrots and EVOO. Coat evenly. Transfer carrots to a baking dish. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and thyme leaves. whole sprigs are fine too. roast for 20 mins. While the carrots are roasting, in a small mixing bowl combine balsamic vinegar and honey. Whisk together. Remove carrots from over and transfer back into the large mixing bowl. Pour balsamic and honey mixture over and coat evenly. Transfer back to the baking dish and roast for another 5-10 minutes until carrots are soft. Serve immediately and enjoy!
